honesty: The corpus-era REGISTRATION: every shared number the committed corpus pins across harnesses, in ONE file, so a corpus-growth cycle re-baselines here (with a lineage entry) instead of hunting literals through the test tree.  Numbers are REPRODUCED live by the harnesses that read them -- this file registers, it never overrides a recompute.  Harness-specific micro-pins stay next to their harness.
era: post-merge union era + C3 cycle-09 census-sourced 86-90 (math2001 ch.4 Proofs-with-Structure-II problems 007/023/025/029/030 -- the ch4 residue that is in-fragment ONCE READ FAITHFULLY: 86 an EVENTUALLY-claim discharged by supplying the threshold as a term (n^3 >= 4n^2+7 for 5 <= n, the T6b witness-term pattern), 87 a modular-residue implication over the admitted `mod` word, 88 the first Pythagorean-triple source (3 <= a for positive a,b,c with a^2+b^2=c^2), 89/90 NEGATED EXISTENTIALS read as universal INEQUALITIES over the frozen != atom (no negation connective needed).  No operator word, macro, carrier, or trust root grows; no reading has a parity or divisibility conclusion, so the arity-1 even/odd op-slot and the dvd macros are untouched); 82 top-level sources

lineage.note: sources landed in manifest; entered the bench checkpoint at the C2 era run

lineage.era: S4b entrance-predicate sources (67-69, PR #23) merged with C2 census-sourced (67-70)
C3 census-sourced growth (71-74): the second math2001 attempt-candidate batch (divisibility family, sibling to 67-70), certified via the inline-author checkpoint resume

C3 cycle-02 census-sourced growth (75-78): the third math2001 attempt-candidate batch, the chapter-1 LINEAR-CALCULATION family (the ch3 dvd-forall candidates are exhausted; a linear-arithmetic cluster cannot perturb the even/odd macro invariant the dvd batches were shaped around), certified via the inline-author checkpoint resume

C3 cycle-03 census-sourced growth (79-81): the fourth math2001 attempt-candidate batch, CONTINUING the chapter-1/2 LINEAR-CALCULATION family (75-78) and nearly exhausting it -- the remaining in-lexicon calculation candidates are these three (linear substitution a=2b+5,b=3->a=11; linear <= chaining m+3<=2n-1,n<=5->m<=6; product identity ad=bc,cf=de->d(af-be)=0); a linear/product cluster cannot perturb the even/odd macro invariant; ch1 003 refused (vacuous: b^2=2a^2 has no nonzero integer witness), >/>= and exists candidates measured out-of-lexicon; certified via the inline-author checkpoint resume

C3 cycle-04 census-sourced growth (82-83): the FIFTH math2001 attempt-candidate batch -- ch.2 Proofs-with-Structure 013/016, the identical surface sentence `n^2 != 2` over the Nat carrier (82) and the Int carrier (83).  OPENS the first `!=`/`\ne` conclusion to certify in the shipped corpus (`!=` is already a builtin atom; the squared term is the already-admitted squaring template ^(v0,2)), so coverage grows with NO operator word, macro, or trust root added.  The Nat/Int pair exercises the ambient-carrier axis on one sentence; neither carries parity or divisibility structure, so the even/odd op-slot and the dvd macros are untouched and the even/odd coverage invariant survives.  Certified TRUE in both bench arms via the inline-author checkpoint resume (both join wave 9); governed exogenous coverage 66 -> 68.  MEASURED-not-shipped (frontier ready-order is by census signal, not transcribability): 82_edge_disjoint (free function symbol + symbolic iteration exponent), 83_fermats_little (mod + symbolic exponent), ch1 003 (vacuous, F2.1), ch1 016/021 + ch2 006 (>/>= outside the < <= atom lexicon).

C3 cycle-06 census-sourced growth (84-85): the SIXTH math2001 attempt-candidate batch -- ch.2 Proofs-with-Structure problems 026 and 028, the FIRST existential-conclusion sources shipped in the corpus.  Both are discharged by the sanctioned WITNESS-TERM form (tests/test_t6b_predecessor_int.py: the committed reading of an exists-claim is a forall with the witness supplied as a term, no exists binder): 84 supplies m=a+1,n=a so (a+1)^2-a^2=2a+1 is a pure forall identity over Int; 85 supplies the Hardy-Ramanujan taxicab witnesses 1,12,9,10 so 1^3+12^3=1729=9^3+10^3 with 1!=9 and 1!=10 is a ground conjunction over Nat.  Builtin ops only (^ at literal exponents 2 and 3, +,-,*,=,!=,and), so NO operator word, macro, or trust root grows; neither carries parity or divisibility structure, so the arity-1 even/odd op-slot and the dvd macros are untouched and the even/odd coverage invariant survives (cluster-key b_evenodd_survives=True, m_f3a9880f19ae intact).  Certified TRUE in both bench arms via the inline-author checkpoint resume (both join wave 9); governed exogenous coverage 68 -> 70.  MEASURED-and-recorded as first-class refusals this cycle (frontier ready-order is by census signal, not transcribability): ch3 Parity-and-Divisibility definitions 001-005 (odd/even/dvd-nat/dvd-int/congruent-modulo) demoted under refused:definition-biconditional -- their faithful form is a definitional biconditional, absent from the and/or/implies fragment (def-005 also names refused:mod-operator).  PARKED (certifies but not shipped): ch3 problem-001 `7 is odd` -- the first main-corpus parity reading, held pending an explicit even/odd coverage decision so the deliberately-closed arity-1 op-slot is not opened unilaterally.

C3 cycle-09 census-sourced growth (86-90): the SEVENTH math2001 attempt-candidate batch -- ch.4 Proofs-with-Structure-II problems 007, 023, 025, 029 and 030.  The batch's theme is the ch4 residue that LOOKS out of reach and is not, once read faithfully: 86 discharges an EVENTUALLY-claim ('for all sufficiently large integers n, n^3 >= 4n^2+7') by supplying the THRESHOLD as a term (5 <= n), the same T6b witness-term move sources 84-85 made for existence, and the certifier reports the threshold TIGHT (boundary_behavior: n=4 fails the hypothesis, and n=4 is exactly where the conclusion fails, 64 < 71); 87 states a modular-residue implication over the already-admitted `mod` word; 88 is the first Pythagorean-triple source (3 <= a for positive a,b,c with a^2+b^2=c^2, the first three-object hypothesis batch); 89 and 90 read NEGATED EXISTENTIALS as universal INEQUALITIES over the frozen != atom -- no negation connective and no exists binder.  Builtin ops plus the one admitted operator word `mod`, so NO operator word, macro, carrier, or trust root grows; no reading has a parity or divisibility conclusion, so the arity-1 even/odd op-slot and the dvd macros are untouched and the even/odd coverage invariant survives (cluster-key b_evenodd_survives=True, m_f3a9880f19ae intact, op_slot_arities [1]).  All five certified TRUE in both bench arms via the inline-author checkpoint resume (all five join a new wave 10); governed exogenous coverage 70 -> 75.  MEASURED-and-recorded as first-class refusals this cycle (frontier ready-order is by census signal, not transcribability), each verdict box-checked before it was ledgered: ch4 definition-001 under refused:property-quantifier + refused:definition-biconditional (it quantifies over a PROPERTY -- 'Prop' refuses at the carrier whitelist); ch4 lemma-003/lemma-004 under refused:iff-connective + refused:negation-connective ('n is even if and only if it is NOT odd'); ch4 problem-002 under refused:hypothesis-quantifier (the faithful hypothesis BINDS m -- 'a factor of EVERY natural number m' -- and hoisting the binder to the prefix is REFUTED by instances, witness n=0,m=0); ch4 problem-011/012/013/015 under refused:iff-connective; ch4 problem-021 under refused:unique-existence (the witness-term form discharges existence but the uniqueness half needs a second, universally-quantified claim conjoined to a ground one); ch4 problem-022 under refused:nonvacuity (t < 3 and t-1 = 6 are contradictory -- the gate named this one itself).  PARKED (certifies but not shipped): ch4 problem-016 ('n^2-10n+24=0 -> n is even'), the first parity-conclusion source measured OUTSIDE ch3, held under the SAME standing evenodd-coverage-decision as the ch3 block rather than opening the deliberately-closed arity-1 op-slot unilaterally; the park is a governance hold, not a fidelity verdict, and its mechanical displacement was NOT re-measured for this source.

cluster_key_reregistration.law: baseline = the LEGACY replay on the grown corpus (reproduced live, never assumed); census-of-record = refined + gc_table; accept_max_dl = baseline - 29 (the T3 window-rule regression magnitude, section 11.10); max_macros = the original per-reading proportion (8 at 37 certified)

holdout_transfer_registration.note: PRE-registered (section 13.2) -- NEVER re-registered on corpus growth; reconstruction replays exactly this slice
